The '''thune''' was a large [[Diet/Legends|herbivorous]] creature with [[Color/Legends|gray]], wrinkled, and hard hides. Living in small herds on the grasslands of [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]], they were typically not aggressive; only when angered did they became dangerous opponents.

Thunes were the size of a small [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]]. From the center of the thune's face hung a huge, noselike appendage, while thin, full [[Ear/Legends|ears]] circled its head like a halo.

The thune could flap its ears—filled with thousands of [[Blood/Legends|blood]] vessels—in order to cool down. The cooled blood in the ears would flow through the rest of the body, lowering its overall temperature.

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Thune_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Thune first appeared in [[Star Wars Galaxies|''Star Wars Galaxies: An Empire Divided'']].
